subtasks.description: Query SAM database for Microsoft licensed users by product/subscription type, including license counts and entitlements
Query consumption facts warehouse for active Microsoft users by product, aggregating by license type and billing period

Reconcile SAM licensed user counts against consumption active users, calculate variance ratios, and classify SKUs as under-provisioned, over-provisioned, or optimally provisioned. Identify specific SKUs and user segments with greatest misalignment

plan.cost_rationale: Three subtasks: two independent SQL queries (small tier—straightforward single-warehouse lookups) for licensed users from SAM and active users from consumption facts, followed by cross_recon (mid tier) to reconcile the two sources, calculate provisioning variance, and classify under/over-provisioning patterns. No policy_action needed—this is reconciliation and classification, not governance approval. No multitool_plan needed—this uses standard warehouse queries and reconciliation logic. Mid tier for reconciliation accounts for multi-signal variance analysis and posture classification logic.

output.sql: SELECT c.publisher, c.product, COUNT(DISTINCT c.license_id) as license_count, COUNT(DISTINCT c.user_id) as active_users, SUM(c.daily_active_seats) as total_active_seats, SUM(c.amount_usd) as total_spend_usd, ROUND(SUM(c.amount_usd) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT c.license_id), 0), 2) as spend_per_license, ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT c.user_id) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT c.license_id), 0), 2) as users_per_license FROM consumption_facts c WHERE c.publisher = 'Microsoft' AND c.event_date >= '2024-01-01' GROUP BY c.publisher, c.product ORDER BY c.product, total_spend_usd DESC

SELECT cf.publisher, cf.product, cf.fiscal_year, cf.fiscal_quarter, COUNT(DISTINCT cf.user_id) as active_users, SUM(cf.daily_active_seats) as total_active_seats, SUM(cf.amount_usd) as total_spend_usd, cf.event_type as license_type FROM consumption_facts cf WHERE cf.publisher = 'Microsoft' AND cf.event_date >= '2024-01-01' GROUP BY cf.publisher, cf.product, cf.fiscal_year, cf.fiscal_quarter, cf.event_type ORDER BY cf.fiscal_year DESC, cf.fiscal_quarter DESC, cf.product
